flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Elizabethtown Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Elizabethtown Community and Technical College rose 59% between 2006 and 2009 (16.5% → 26.2%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Elizabethtown Community and Technical College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Elizabethtown Community and Technical College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (64.2% → 76.3%).
